response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video 00:00-05:00. 2. Identified intro screen 00:00-02:52. 3. Identified performance 02:53-04:55. 4. OCR'd song metadata at 03:09: Title 'HAPPY MUSIC', Lyricist 'ふじの マナミ', Composer/Arranger '片岡 嗣実'. 5. Verified that Parquets (PARQUETS) is the original artist unit composed of these two. 6. Searched for official lyrics but could not find an indexed text version. 7. Transcribed the full lyrics from the video's on-screen text. 8. Translated transcribed lyrics into English. 9. Constructed the JSON object.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a live performance by the VTuber Shiranui Flare, who sings 'HAPPY MUSIC', a song originally composed by Parquets (lyrics by Manami Fujino, music/arrangement by Tsugumi Kataoka). The video begins with an intro screen, followed by the song performance, and ends with a brief concluding scene.

scenes.description: The video starts with an intro screen for 'BEMANI 3DLIVE' and 'Shiranui Flare Birthday Festival 2026'. No vocal music is played during this intro period.

Shiranui Flare performs the song 'HAPPY MUSIC'. The song is a energetic track that highlights her vocal performance. The songwriter credits (Manami Fujino, Tsugumi Kataoka) appear on the screen along with the song title.
scenes.original_artist: Parquets (ふじのマナミ, 片岡嗣実)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
どうかししてる また同じシャツを
いないはずの 人込みに捜してた
だれといても 何を話しても
映るすべて やだ またかさねている
名前しか知らない なのにね こんなに
気になるの……これって もしかして
ほら たった今 あたしのなかで 響くよ ハッピーミュージック
運命の針を 胸に落として 奏でる
大事な日も まじめな時も 手加減なしの パワープレイ
誰よりも先 あなたを見つけたくて
ダーリン 今度も あのシャツきてきて
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It's strange, wearing the same shirt again
I was searching in the crowd where you shouldn't be
No matter who I'm with, no matter what I'm talking about
Everything reflected, oh no, I'm overlapping it again
I only know your name, and yet, so much
I'm curious... is it, could it be?
Look, just now, ringing inside me, Happy Music
Dropping the needle of fate onto my chest, and playing it
On important days, and even when I'm serious, a no-holds-barred power play
Before anyone else, I want to find you
Darling, next time too, wear that shirt, come on.

scenes.description: The performance ends, and the video transitions to a brief concluding scene.
